stories.headline: SEC Chair Atkins unveils 'Project Crypto' at Bitcoin 2026, classifies most tokens as non-securities
stories.tldr: Paul Atkins debuted a Commission-wide initiative at Bitcoin 2026 establishing a five-category token taxonomy that pulls most digital assets out of securities law.
stories.why_it_matters: Why it matters: A formal SEC taxonomy ends years of regulation-by-enforcement and unlocks clearer registration paths for issuers, exchanges and DeFi front-ends.
the_details: Atkins unveiled Project Crypto on the Bitcoin 2026 mainstage in Las Vegas, where 40,000+ attendees gathered April 27-29.
The framework builds on the joint SEC-CFTC interpretive release from March 17, 2026 that introduced the five-bucket taxonomy.
Follows the April 13 SEC staff statement carving out 'Covered User Interface Providers' from broker-dealer registration.

stories.headline: Western Union pivots to blockchain, launches Solana-based stablecoin USDPT with Anchorage
stories.tldr: The 175-year-old remittance giant unveiled USDPT, a Solana-powered dollar stablecoin issued via Anchorage Digital Bank under the GENIUS Act framework.
stories.why_it_matters: Why it matters: A legacy money-transfer giant choosing Solana over private rails validates the chain as institutional payments infrastructure and pressures Visa, Mastercard, and SWIFT.
the_details: USDPT will issue from Anchorage Digital Bank, the first OCC-chartered crypto bank, satisfying GENIUS Act stablecoin requirements.
Western Union processes ~$300B in cross-border volume annually across 200+ countries and 130+ currencies.
Announcement coincides with FDIC stablecoin rulemaking notices issued earlier this month.

stories.headline: Fed wraps two-day meeting today as US consumer sentiment crashes to all-time low 49.8
stories.tldr: The FOMC concludes its policy meeting Wednesday with crypto markets pinned by a Michigan sentiment print at a record-low 49.8 and 1-year inflation expectations spiking to 4.8%.
stories.why_it_matters: Why it matters: A dovish Fed could re-ignite the late-March BTC rally from sub-$65K, while any hawkish surprise risks dragging spot back through $76,500 support.
the_details: University of Michigan consumer sentiment index hit 49.8, the lowest reading on record, driven by Iran-conflict inflation pressures.
1-year inflation expectations jumped to 4.8% in April from 3.8% in March, a level the Fed actively tries to anchor.
BTC trades near $76,500 after stalling at $80,000 resistance; ETH at $2,322, down 0.7% over 24h.

stories.headline: Solana spot ETF inflows collapse 92% to $34M in April from $419M peak in November 2025
stories.tldr: Spot SOL ETF demand has cratered from $419M monthly inflows last November to just $34M in April, even as Firedancer and Alpenglow upgrade milestones land.
stories.why_it_matters: Why it matters: Institutional appetite for non-BTC ETF wrappers is fading fast — a warning sign for upcoming XRP, LTC, and DOGE ETF issuers banking on similar flows.
the_details: SOL trades at $86.47 with a $49.8B market cap, ranking 7th by capitalization.
Alpenglow upgrade went live, cutting transaction finality below 200ms; Firedancer targets 1M TPS from current ~1,300.
Alameda estate unstaked $16M of SOL on April 13, possibly for FTX creditor distributions, adding sell pressure.

stories.headline: TOKEN2049 Dubai pushed to 2027 as UAE security risks force largest crypto event to relocate
stories.tldr: Organizers postponed the flagship Dubai conference to 2027, citing heightened regional security risks tied to the ongoing Iran conflict.
stories.why_it_matters: Why it matters: The MENA crypto-event vacuum likely shifts capital and deal flow toward Singapore, Hong Kong and Riyadh — and signals geopolitical risk now eclipses regulatory risk for global gatherings.
the_details: TOKEN2049 Dubai typically draws 15,000+ attendees and is one of the two largest annual crypto conferences globally.
Postponement decision attributed to UAE security situation amid the regional Iran conflict.
Comes as Bitcoin 2026 in Las Vegas pulled record 40,000+ attendees April 27-29.
